backend.changelog: The Stop button on the Generate progress bar is now always clickable while a run is in progress, so you can cancel a long or runaway Generate. (Pairs with CadBridge 1.8.58, which stops large assemblies from keeping every part open at once.)

cadBridge.changelog: Large-assembly stability: Generate no longer keeps every part open at the same time. Previously each component was opened and left open through the run; on very large assemblies (hundreds of parts) this exhausted SolidWorks' resources and crashed it. Each part is now closed right after its outputs are produced, so only one or two are open at a time. Also: if SolidWorks stops responding mid-run, Generate now aborts cleanly with a clear message instead of flooding errors. Strongly recommended for anyone generating large assemblies. Test on a small assembly first.
